wiki.summary: “Big Poe” is the opening track on Tyler, The Creator’s ninth album, DON'T TAP THE GLASS. A snippet of the song’s intro was first revealed on the album’s promotional website, “donttaptheglass.com”, which was projected on multiple screens at his tour concert on July 18 in Brooklyn, New York. The snippet was later shared on social media. The intro’s lyrics include a different set of rules provided for the listeners of this project, such as “no sitting still” Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “Big Poe” is the opening track on Tyler, The Creator’s ninth album, DON'T TAP THE GLASS. A snippet of the song’s intro was first revealed on the album’s promotional website, “donttaptheglass.com”, which was projected on multiple screens at his tour concert on July 18 in Brooklyn, New York. The snippet was later shared on social media. The intro’s lyrics include a different set of rules provided for the listeners of this project, such as “no sitting still”, “leave your baggage at home”, and of course, “don’t touch the glass”. On the same website, images of the different rules were shared. Read more on Last.fm. User-contributed text is available under the Creative Commons By-SA License; additional terms may apply.
